steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The passage directly contrasts what the researchers expected (uniform fields like those in other galactic bones) with what they found (no clear pattern or direction).

steps.title: Match the contrast to the correct answer
steps.content: The field's lack of uniformity—expressed as having no clear pattern or direction—was the source of the surprise. Choices A, B, and C either introduce information not in the passage or contradict the stated contrast. That matches choice D — D is correct.
